subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-24 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The believers must be pleased to comply with my wish. If my first expresion in any matter is obeyed, it will lead to success and spiritual happiness.
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @personal instructions
